assertions.text: Warns about large number of changed files
assertions.evidence: Phase 1 triggers >30 file abort condition, warns user and asks to confirm scope before proceeding

assertions.text: Runs backend and frontend quality gates
assertions.evidence: Phase 3 runs both gates in parallel (background bash processes) with full command suites

assertions.text: Performs environment variable diff before deploying
assertions.evidence: Phase 5 diffs .env.example against Cloud Run and Vercel, flags 2 missing backend vars
Phase 10 captures 3 samples per endpoint, averages samples 2-3, saves baseline table

assertions.text: Uses canary deployment strategy for Cloud Run
assertions.evidence: Phase 11 deploys with --no-traffic, then ramps 10% -> 50% -> 100% with verification at each stage
Phase 12 compares post-deploy averages against baselines with ratio calculation (all within 1.5x threshold)

assertions.text: Has rollback strategy if deployment fails
assertions.evidence: Phase 13 describes Cloud Run revision rollback and Vercel rollback commands with post-rollback verification
